use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and dialogs
Icon-only toolbar buttons with compact sizing
Destructive action triggers with red variant
Secondary/ghost actions in card layouts and menus
ai_summary: A foundational atomic Button component built with React, class-variance-authority, and Radix UI's Slot for composition. Provides 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) for flexible use across any UI context. Includes accessibility features with focus-visible ring states and disabled state handling.
